verification_gate: Red tests fail first for: API surface defined; Audit-log schema set; Reversibility guaranteed; green only when all pass with a recorded proof record.

gate_result.api_evidence: HostControlPlane exposes the declarative registry plus acquire/release/sweep/revertFromLog/audit/resource; the registry carries schema_version host-control-registry.v0 with four registered resources.
gate_result.audit_evidence: Every action appends a structured JSONL entry {at, action, resource, prior|restored, owner, ttl_ms}; acquire records the captured prior state, release records restored:true.
gate_result.reversibility_evidence: release() re-probes the host and verifies it equals the recorded prior state (restored:true asserted live on a real loopback port).
gate_result.product_execution_evidence: Real port binds, real lease dirs, real audit files — no mocks.
gate_result.red_first: gates committed red with the control plane absent (8/8 files failing) at the lane red commit, green at HEAD

proof_summary: ARCHBP-101 is complete: the host-control plane is a declarative, audited API — a schema-versioned resource registry, acquire/release/sweep/revert methods, a structured append-only audit log, and reversibility verified by post-release re-probe against the recorded prior state.
